calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Gena Eales, CSR 176. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Dec-19-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: The matter comes on calendar this date, having been assigned by Department 206 for Court Trial and Stipulation of the parties.
Judge David L. Ballati, Clerk Nancy Regas, Court Reporter Susan Lee, CSR #4280, Dept. 604.
David Marcolini, counsel for Plaintiff, Resurgence Financial, LLC is present.
Defendant, Lorisa Bondarenko and her counsel, Michael Heath, are present.
The parties stipulate to a Judgment in the amount of $5,000, which is not to be entered by Plaintiff provided Defendant pays $1000 within 5 days from today and pays $1000 within 30 days from today. Plaintiff is to report the mater is paid in full. Plaintiff will not enter a judgment within 5 days prior notice to Defendant's counsel. If paid on time Plaintiff will file a dismissal without prejudice. The Court retains jurisdiction pursuant to Section 664.6 CCP. Counsel for Defendant to prepare the stipulation.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2006 Set For Trial On Oct-30-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
